title: ruta griffithiana
intro: Ruta griffithiana, also known as Indian pennywort, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, commonly found in the Himalayan regions of India and Nepal. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ruta griffithiana include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cognitive function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
